final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original interior scene illustration of a 北欧 minimalist home living space (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 极简主义 北欧 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include large window as light source, sofa as focal center, plants and floor lamp flanking
Subject: must include a gray fabric sofa, green potted plants, and a floor lamp
Scene/backdrop: must include white walls and light wood-tone flooring
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, bright, warm and cozy atmosphere with sunlight streaming through large windows — exact light quality and shadow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a clean, light direction — white, light wood tones, and soft gray as dominant — exact tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs soft fabric, natural wood, and matte wall surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
